metadataShape.title: display title
metadataShape.url: runtime URL or committed content path
metadataShape.root: docs root key used for sidebar scoping and resource links
metadataShape.parent: optional parent id for nested IA

entries.title: Project Direction
entries.excerpt: The target structure and product direction for generated WordPress documentation.
entries.body: WP Docs is an experiment for generating comprehensive WordPress core and canonical plugin documentation. Navigation search examples and information architecture are first class product work.

entries.title: Full Coverage Generation Plan
entries.excerpt: Plan for generating source-verified user, developer, reference, and internals documentation.
entries.body: Generate from public WordPress source and documentation sources. Preserve provenance in page metadata and review ledgers. Keep generated drafts reproducible and disposable.

entries.title: User Docs Generation Plan
entries.excerpt: User-facing documentation generation plan and review expectations.
entries.body: User documentation should be accurate source verified and pleasant to navigate. The corpus separates user facing docs developer docs reference material and internals.

entries.title: Script Modules Pilot Recipe
entries.excerpt: WP Codebox recipe for reproducible Script Modules API documentation generation and review.
entries.body: The current pilot output target is developer script modules documentation for the WordPress Core Script Modules API. Recipes provide reproducible generation and review runs.
